title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, discusses the shift in software engineering from manual coding to managing teams of autonomous agents. He presents data showing rapid adoption: 30% of Cursor PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise code generation jumped from 15% to 75% in a year, and agents are now capable of building complex systems like browsers autonomously.
